title: JK Tyre Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: JK Tyre Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
JK Tyre Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About JK Tyre Ventures Solutions:
JK Tyre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre Ventures Solutions!
